gist.headline: Credit where credit is due
gist.blurb: We've updated our community showcase to properly credit @Juanrivera126 for two awesome apps. Thanks for building with us!
gist.summary: Updated the community showcase to correctly attribute the Artistic Styles Book and Proyecto Descartes apps to their real creator, @Juanrivera126.
gist.impact: Contributors get the proper recognition they deserve on the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot organizing a community bulletin board, carefully placing a name tag on a beautiful piece of art. Represents giving proper credit to creators.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully pinning a name tag to a beautiful painting on a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
